name: SDK Playground
description: Developer playground demonstrating every Asyar SDK service in a Tier 2 extension
author: Developer

preferences.name: displayName
preferences.title: Display name
preferences.description: Shown on the Preferences tab to demonstrate textfield values.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Test API key
preferences.description: Demonstrates password encryption at rest. Never leaves this device.

actions.title: Fire Test Notification
actions.description: Send a system notification — demonstrates INotificationService from root search

actions.title: Show HUD
actions.description: Display a brief HUD overlay — demonstrates IFeedbackService from root search

commands.name: Open SDK Playground
commands.description: Exercise every SDK service in a sandboxed Tier 2 extension

actions.title: Reset Tick Log
actions.description: Clear the scheduling tick history shown in the Scheduling section

commands.name: Scheduling Tick Test
commands.description: Background command fired by the platform scheduler every 60 seconds

actions.title: Trigger Tick Now
actions.description: Manually fire the scheduled tick command outside its interval

commands.name: Scheduling Tick Test (10s floor)
commands.description: End-to-end probe at the 10-second minimum interval — verifies sub-minute pollers traverse the full Rust→host→iframe pipeline

commands.name: Coffee — extend
commands.description: Fired by the Extend button on the notification demo. Records the event in the Notifications section log.

commands.name: Coffee — stop
commands.description: Fired by the Stop button on the notification demo. Records the event in the Notifications section log.
